---
applyTo: "manuscripts/**"
---


# Manuscripts

Treat manuscript text as a formal artifact.

Do not remove TODOs, placeholders, comments, citations, or evidence markers unless explicitly requested.

Do not invent results. Keep placeholders where values are not verified.

Citations and factual claims must be precise. Do not cite internal source documents in manuscript prose unless the manuscript is supposed to cite them.

Do not run broad prose rewrites when task targets code or validation.
